---
title: "Domain Knowledge"
description: |
  Data professionals work in multiple fields, and may usually move from one 
  industry to another in the course of their work. This usually means that they
  will have to consider domain expertise or domain knowledge in their work, 
  which may or may not involve other people in their respective organizations.
author:
  - name: TJ Palanca
    url: https://www.twitter.com/tjpalanca
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
    toc: true
categories:
  - Data Science
---

## When is domain expertise important?

The degree to which domain expertise must be considered is dependent on:

* the degree to which the problems are "data complete", which also decides the 
  level to which one needs to rely on domain expertise to arrive at some 
  conclusion, and 
* the amount of expertise that has accumulated for that particular domain.

### Data Completeness
